_comment: IN-BUNDLE manifest at the root of hxstorefront-1.0.0.hxapp (a zip), validated by case_service.marketplace.checksum.parse_and_validate_manifest. A module .hxapp carries NO executable backend code — the HxStorefront Python ships in the Velaris image; the storefront_* tables ship on the normal migration track (096). Install only flips the in-image routes (/api/v1/storefront + the public /api/v1/storefront/public routes) + the Studio module per tenant via marketplace_installs.
name: HxStorefront
description: Hosted store builder — a Velaris-native storefront whose orders flow through HxCheckout.
